inputs.label: Cat Age (Years)
inputs.businessContext: The whole number of years the cat has lived. Minimum 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: The whole number of years the cat has lived. Minimum 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kedinin yaşadığı tam yıl sayısı. Minimum 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gesamte Anzahl der Jahre, die die Katze gelebt hat. Minimum 0.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre entier d'années de vie du chat. Minimum 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número entero de años que ha vivido el gato. Mínimo 0.

inputs.label: Cat Age (Additional Months)
inputs.businessContext: Additional months beyond whole years, from 0 to 11. For cats under 1 year, use years=0 and enter months here.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional months beyond whole years, from 0 to 11. For cats under 1 year, use years=0 and enter months here.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam yılların ötesindeki ek aylar, 0 ile 11 arasında. 1 yaşından küçük kediler için yıl=0 kullanın ve ayları buraya girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zusätzliche Monate über die vollen Jahre hinaus, von 0 bis 11. Für Katzen unter 1 Jahr verwenden Sie Jahre=0 und geben Sie die Monate hier ein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mois supplémentaires au-delà des années entières, de 0 à 11. Pour les chats de moins d'un an, utiliser années=0 et saisir les mois ici.
businessContext_i18n.es: Meses adicionales más allá de los años completos, de 0 a 11. Para gatos menores de 1 año, use años=0 e ingrese los meses aquí.

inputs.label: Lifestyle Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment for indoor/outdoor lifestyle: Indoor only = 1.0, Outdoor access = 0.9, Feral = 0.8. Lower factor means slower aging in human years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment for indoor/outdoor lifestyle: Indoor only = 1.0, Outdoor access = 0.9, Feral = 0.8. Lower factor means slower aging in human years.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İç/dış mekan yaşam tarzına göre ayarlama: Yalnızca iç mekan = 1.0, Dış mekana erişim = 0.9, Sokak kedisi = 0.8. Düşük faktör, insan yılı cinsinden daha yavaş yaşlanma anlamına gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung für Innen-/Außenlebensstil: Nur Innenhaltung = 1,0, Zugang nach draußen = 0,9, verwildert = 0,8. Niedrigerer Faktor bedeutet langsamere Alterung in Menschenjahren.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement pour le mode de vie intérieur/extérieur : Intérieur uniquement = 1,0, Accès extérieur = 0,9, Errant = 0,8. Un facteur plus faible signifie un vieillissement plus lent en années humaines.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste por estilo de vida interior/exterior: Solo interior = 1.0, Acceso exterior = 0.9, Callejero = 0.8. Un factor más bajo significa un envejecimiento más lento en años humanos.

inputs.label: Diet Quality Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment for diet quality: Premium diet = 0.95, Normal diet = 1.0, Poor diet = 1.1. Higher factor means faster aging.

label_i18n.es: Factor de calidad de la dieta

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment for diet quality: Premium diet = 0.95, Normal diet = 1.0, Poor diet = 1.1. Higher factor means faster aging.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Diyet kalitesine göre ayarlama: Premium diyet = 0.95, Normal diyet = 1.0, Kötü diyet = 1.1. Yüksek faktör daha hızlı yaşlanma anlamına gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung für Futterqualität: Premium-Futter = 0,95, Normales Futter = 1,0, Schlechtes Futter = 1,1. Höherer Faktor bedeutet schnellere Alterung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement pour la qualité de l'alimentation : Alimentation premium = 0,95, Alimentation normale = 1,0, Alimentation pauvre = 1,1. Un facteur plus élevé signifie un vieillissement plus rapide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste por calidad de la dieta: Dieta premium = 0.95, Dieta normal = 1.0, Dieta pobre = 1.1. Un factor más alto significa un envejecimiento más rápido.

inputs.label: Neutered/Spayed Factor
inputs.businessContext: Adjustment if neutered/spayed: Yes = 1.0, No = 1.05. Intact cats may age slightly faster due to stress.

businessContext_i18n.en: Adjustment if neutered/spayed: Yes = 1.0, No = 1.05. Intact cats may age slightly faster due to stress.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kısırlaştırılmışsa ayarlama: Evet = 1.0, Hayır = 1.05. Kısırlaştırılmamış kediler stres nedeniyle biraz daha hızlı yaşlanabilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anpassung bei Kastration/Sterilisation: Ja = 1,0, Nein = 1,05. Nicht kastrierte Katzen können aufgrund von Stress etwas schneller altern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ajustement si stérilisé : Oui = 1,0, Non = 1,05. Les chats non stérilisés peuvent vieillir légèrement plus vite en raison du stress.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ajuste si está esterilizado/castrado: Sí = 1.0, No = 1.05. Los gatos intactos pueden envejecer ligeramente más rápido debido al estrés.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
